validation_rules.requirement: Alcohol on field or conference receipts
validation_rules.notes: Not eligible against DFG or EU grant lines
Only one valid receipt per expense
Excess over BRKG per-diem needs justification
Must be filed within the grant reporting window
Re-book to correct DFG or EU work package

context: Rules used when validating fieldwork and conference reimbursement claims against DFG and EU Horizon grant budget lines.
